safe_wording: Three HDR donor candidates were computationally designed and documented.
avoid_wording: The donors were experimentally built or integrated.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Vendor synthesis records or experimental integration data.

safe_wording: Sequence-level QC summaries are provided for length, frame/translation, restriction screens, repeats, and feature boundaries.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Independent rerun of QC using deposited scripts and tool versions.

safe_wording: Target-locus compatibility was checked in silico against BY4741 for the donor-package regions.
avoid_wording: BY4741 genome is fully validated or structurally confirmed.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: BUSCO, read mapping, synteny/SV analysis, or long-read confirmation.

safe_wording: Computational sequence validation was performed for donor-candidate design review.
avoid_wording: Validated strain, validated EV platform, or validated therapeutic system.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Wet-lab transformation, sequencing, expression, and phenotype assays.

safe_wording: The package designs ISC1/YER019W aa56-477 payload sequences.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: RT-qPCR, Western blot/proteomics, tagged expression, or targeted MS.

safe_wording: The files support donor-candidate design only.
avoid_wording: The edit was integrated into the yeast genome.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Colony PCR, junction PCR, Sanger/NGS across insertion sites.

safe_wording: No lipidomic or sphingolipid assay data are included.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: LC-MS/MS lipidomics with controls and replicates.

safe_wording: No EV particle-count, size, morphology, purity, or cargo data are included.
avoid_wording: The engineered yeast produces altered or improved EVs.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: NTA, TEM, protein quantification, contamination controls, replicate statistics.

avoid_wording: EVs load or deliver peptide cargo.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Fluorescence calibration, pellet/supernatant/wash mass balance, particle-normalized loading.

safe_wording: No cell, animal, BBB, immune, or uptake data are included.
avoid_wording: The EVs evade immune detection or cross the BBB.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Validated in vitro/in vivo assays with controls.

safe_wording: The repository does not test disease or therapeutic outcomes.
avoid_wording: The system treats Alzheimer’s, aging brain decline, or disease.
evidence_needed_to_upgrade: Disease-model assays, safety data, delivery data, and efficacy endpoints.
